ValidationRule.description: Rate Schedule End Date can not be after Lease Redelivery Date.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: false /* IF(AND(Lease__r.Lease_End_Date_New__c > TODAY(), ISNULL(Lease__r.Redelivery_Date__c)) , MR_Rate_End_Date__c > Lease__r.Lease_End_Date_New__c , MR_Rate_End_Date__c > Lease__r.Redelivery_Date_F__c) */
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Rate Schedule End Date can not be after Lease Redelivery Date or Lease End Date (in case Redelivery Date is blank and end date > today). Please update Rate Schedule End Date.
